channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pete Hegseth Faces Criticism After Saying Guantanamo Detainees Should Have Been Executed
item.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth drew significant criticism after making controversial remarks about detainees held at the Guantanamo Bay detention facility in Cuba. Speaking to reporters during a ...

item.title: Rep. Jim McGovern Accuses Trump of Corruption and Criticizes Republican Support During Interview
item.description: Rep. Jim McGovern, a Democratic congressman from Massachusetts, delivered a sharp criticism of President Donald Trump during an interview with journalist Scott MacFarlane of MeidasTouch. McGovern argu...

item.title: Musk Outlines Future SpaceX and Tesla Collaboration on Orbital Data Centers and Space-Based AI Infrastructure
item.description: A video interview released on June 9, 2026, provided new insight into Elon Musk's long-term vision for collaboration between SpaceX and Tesla. According to the report, Musk described ambitious plans i...

item.title: Federal Judge Warns DOJ Against Reviving Suspended Anti-Weaponization Fund Amid CREW Challenge
item.description: A federal judge in Washington, D.C., declined to immediately block the Trump administration's proposed 'Anti-Weaponization' fund after government lawyers stated that the program is no longer moving fo...

item.title: Republican and Democratic Lawmakers Respond to Trump's Remarks on Rising Inflation
item.description: President Donald Trump drew criticism and concern after telling reporters in the Oval Office that he was not worried about inflation and stating, 'I love the inflation,' while signing the Secure Ameri...

item.title: Conservative Pastor Criticizes Obama's Presidential Center and Its Architectural Design
item.description: A controversy emerged ahead of the opening of former President Barack Obama's presidential center in Chicago after conservative radio pastor and Wretched TV host Todd Friel sharply criticized the proj...

item.title: The Longest Tale Launches on PC with New Trailer Showcasing Mythical Realms and Action RPG Gameplay
item.description: Dev Null Productions has released the official launch trailer for The Longest Tale, a third-person mythical action role-playing game that is now available for PC through Steam. The trailer introduces ...

item.title: Report Claims Pam Bondi Distributed Unvetted Epstein-Related Binders During White House Influencer Briefing

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Photos Highlight Judy Garland’s Real-Life Bond With Terry, the Dog Who Played Toto
item.description: A collection of photographs from the production of the 1939 classic film “The Wizard of Oz” showcases the close relationship between actress Judy Garland and Terry, the female Cairn Terrier who portra...

item.title: Report Claims Meghan Markle and Prince Harry Are Continuing Efforts to Rebuild Relations With King Charles
item.description: This live Royal Family news blog from the Daily Express focuses primarily on reports that Meghan Markle and Prince Harry are continuing efforts to improve their relationship with King Charles III. Acc...

item.title: Opinion Piece Argues Presidential Cognitive Screening Should Be Standardized Rather Than Used as a Political Talking Point
item.description: In this opinion article, vascular and cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Anahita Dua argues that President Donald Trump's public comments about passing cognitive tests should not be viewed as definitive proof...

item.title: Trump Defends Iran War Strategy, Says Economic Downturn Was Intentional to Prevent Nuclear Threat
item.description: In a Wednesday Oval Office press interaction, President Donald Trump defended the economic consequences of his administration's military action against Iran, claiming he intentionally contributed to a...

item.title: Former Allies and Republicans Criticize Nancy Mace Following Defeat in South Carolina GOP Governor Primary
item.description: South Carolina Representative Nancy Mace suffered a major political setback after finishing fifth in the Republican primary for governor, a result that many observers viewed as a decisive blow to her ...

item.title: Louisiana Enacts New Voter ID Requirements and Mandates Citizenship Verification Checks for All Registered Voters
item.description: Louisiana has approved two new election laws that will tighten voter identification requirements and require state election officials to verify all registered voters through a federal immigration data...

item.title: House Democrat Raises Concerns About Trump's Health and Alertness During Public Events

item.description: Actor Rainn Wilson, best known for portraying Dwight Schrute on the television series 'The Office,' participated in a bipartisan event on Capitol Hill focused on religious freedom as the United States...

item.title: Opinion columnist argues Trump's response to media questioning reveals intolerance of factual scrutiny
item.description: This opinion article by journalist Ray Richmond argues that President Donald Trump's public behavior demonstrates an inability to handle factual challenges and critical questioning. The author begins ...

item.title: Rising Inflation and Energy Costs Raise Concerns for Republicans Ahead of Midterm Elections
item.description: A new inflation report has intensified concerns about the political outlook for Republicans ahead of the 2026 U.S. midterm elections. According to the article, consumer prices increased by 4.2% in May...

item.title: US Inflation Rises to 4.2 Percent in May Due to Oil Disruptions from Iran Conflict
item.description: The latest Consumer Price Index data released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics shows that inflation in the United States climbed to 4.2 percent in May 2026, marking a three-year high. This represents...
